translations: And (do) not turn your cheek from men
and (do) not walk in the earth
puzzle.hint: A piece of advice from Luqman to his son about the importance of humility and avoiding arrogance.
puzzle.arabic: وَلَا تُصَعِّرْ خَدَّكَ لِلنَّاسِ وَلَا تَمْشِ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ مَرَحًا ۖ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ لَا يُحِبُّ كُلَّ مُخْتَالٍۢ فَخُورٍۢ
puzzle.verseEn: And do not turn your cheek [in contempt] toward people and do not walk through the earth exultantly. Indeed, Allāh does not like everyone self-deluded and boastful.
